LAW AND MOTION 302, ETITIONER CATALINA STRUCTURED FUNDING, INC.'S PETITION FOR APPROVAL FOR TRANSFER OF STRUCTURED SETTLEMET PAYMENT RIGHTS BY AND BETWEEN JUSTIN BROWN AND CATALINA STRUCTURED FUNDING, INC., PURSUANT TO CALIFORNIA INSURANCE CODE 10134, ET SEQ. BOLANOS; CLERK: GINA GONZALES; NOT REPORTED.

calendar.matters:
Notice Of Hearing Of Petition For Approval For Transfer Of Structured Settlemet Payment Rights By And Between Justin Brown And Catalina Structured Funding, Inc., Pursuant To California Insurance Code 10134, Et Seq.
Off Calendar Aug-15-2017 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance.

RULING: There being no objection, the Court adopted its tentative ruling. PETITIONER CATALINA STRUCTURED FUNDING, INC.'S Petition For Approval For Transfer Of Structured Settlemet Payment Rights By And Between Justin Brown And Catalina Structured Funding, Inc., Pursuant To California Insurance Code 10134, Et Seq. is granted. No opposition filed and the petition complies with Cal. Ins. Code sec. 10134 et seq. The Court signed the order submitted by the moving party via email. Judge: Suzanne R. Bolanos; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Not reported.
